title: pentameris montana
intro: Pentameris montana, also known as mountain sedge or mountain grass sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass-like plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. Pentameris montana has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can help to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support respiratory health.
